title: acampe praemorsa
intro: Acampe praemorsa, also known as the Black Coral, is a species of orchid plant native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Acampe praemorsa include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory problems, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or made into powders and capsules for oral consumption.
